name: sutra-bindings-slm
description: Native on-device SLM bindings (llama.cpp / GGUF). Implements SlmRuntime without an HTTP sidecar.

scripts.certify: pnpm run build && node ./bin/bindings-slm.mjs certify --profile desktop --adapter llamacpp
scripts.certify:android: pnpm run build && node ./bin/bindings-slm.mjs certify --profile android-mid --adapter onnx
scripts.certify:apple-silicon: pnpm run build && node ./bin/bindings-slm.mjs certify --profile apple-silicon --adapter mlx
scripts.test: pnpm run build && node --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/llamacpp_runtime.test.mjs tests/gguf_metadata.test.mjs tests/deadline_stream.test.mjs tests/model_adapter.test.mjs tests/certify_profile.test.mjs tests/ci_job.test.mjs tests/offline_turn_proof.test.mjs tests/onnx_memory_ceiling.test.mjs tests/onnx_android_cert.test.mjs tests/mlx_runtime.test.mjs tests/mlx_deadline_stream.test.mjs tests/mlx_apple_silicon_cert.test.mjs tests/aicore_seam.test.mjs tests/aicore_fallback.test.mjs tests/aicore_device_integration.test.mjs tests/unified_certify_harness.test.mjs tests/cert_registry_schema.test.mjs tests/one_command_certify_prove.test.mjs tests/certified_binding_docs.test.mjs tests/adapter_train.test.mjs tests/adapter_load.test.mjs tests/adapter_cache.test.mjs tests/hot_swap_concurrent_load.test.mjs tests/ollama_backend.test.mjs
